name: SonicWall Firewall
description: SonicWall SonicOS REST API for managing firewall access rules, address objects, NAT policies, and security services

actions.name: List Access Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all IPv4 firewall access rules

actions.name: Create Access Rule
actions.description: Create a new IPv4 firewall access rule to allow or deny traffic

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Access rule definition including from/to zone, source/destination, service, action (allow/deny/discard)

actions.name: Delete Access Rule
actions.description: Delete a specific IPv4 access rule by UUID

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: UUID of the access rule to delete

actions.name: List Address Objects
actions.description: Retrieve all IPv4 address objects configured on the firewall

actions.name: Create Address Object
actions.description: Create a new IPv4 address object (host, range, or network) for use in rules

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Address object including name, zone, address_type (host/network/range), and address value

actions.name: List Zones
actions.description: Retrieve all security zones configured on the firewall

actions.name: Commit Pending Changes
actions.description: Commit pending configuration changes to make them active
